---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new check, flag, or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the use case or pain point.

**Proposed solution**
How you'd like it to work (flag name, behavior, output format).

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds or different approaches you've thought of.

**Which component?**
- [ ] Agent (code-reviewer, security-auditor, simplify, git-history-reviewer, review-verifier)
- [ ] Pipeline (review-pr.md orchestration)
- [ ] Learn (wiki patterns, cleanup, calibration)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other
